title: HII Awarded $1.3 Billion Contract for the Detail Design & Construction of LPD 32
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., March 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Ingalls Shipbuilding division has received a $1.3 billion modification to a previously awarded contract from the U.S. Navy for the procurement of the detail design and construction of amphibious transport dock LPD 32. The resulting fixed-price-incentive contract totals $1.54 billion. The ship will be the 16th in the San Antonio class and the third Flight II LPD.

title: HII Invites Sea-Air-Space Expo Attendees to See Beyond
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., March 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) will launch a promotional campaign at the Navy League's Sea-Air-Space Global Maritime Expo 2023 highlighting the defense contractor's evolution with its customers, expansion of its portfolio and innovation of its shipbuilding execution, by encouraging attendees to “See Beyond” what they believe they know about HII. Through presentations, interactive demonstrations, advertising and displays, the nation's largest shipbuilder encourages attendees to:

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Wins CVN 74 Aircraft Carrier Deal
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) is set to offer engineering services and planning for CVN 74 refueling complex overhaul. It will also provide maintenance and operator training as well as technical and repair support for the same.

title: Huntington Ingalls Industries: Stability At Ingalls Shipyard Is Critical
text: 2022 finances were positive. $1 billion has been invested in the Ingalls Shipyard to improve productivity and competitiveness.

title: HII Announces New Vice President and Chief Counsel of Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., March 24, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that Julie Jarrell Gresham has been named vice president and chief counsel of the company's Ingalls Shipbuilding division. She will succeed George Simmerman Jr. who will retire March 31, 2023, after 32 years with the company.

title: HII Celebrates 200 Graduates of The Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., March 18, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) hosted commencement exercises today, celebrating 200 graduates of the company's Apprentice School at Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS). The ceremony was held at Liberty Live Church in Hampton.

title: Media Advisory – Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School to Host Commencement Ceremony for 200 Graduates
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., March 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- About HII

title: HII Receives Additive Manufacturing Approval from Naval Sea Systems Command
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., March 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global all-domain defense partner HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that its Newport News Shipbuilding division recently received approval as a vendor to provide some additive manufacturing components to Naval Sea Systems (NAVSEA) platforms.

title: Huntington Ingalls: Significantly Undervalued Dividend Growth
text: In this article, we discuss Huntington Ingalls, the backbone of the US Navy, thanks to two shipbuilding operations and technical operations support. After struggling for more than five years, the company is back on track. Supply chain issues are fading, investment requirements are slowing, and new deliveries are accelerating.

title: HII Hosts Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Michael Gilday at Newport News Shipbuilding
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., March 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) hosted Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Michael Gilday for a visit to the company's Newport News Shipbuilding division on Thursday during a scheduled visit to Hampton Roads. While in Newport News, Gilday met with NNS leadership and toured the shipyard.

title: HII Hosts Congressional Delegation and USMC Officers at Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., March 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division hosted U.S. Reps. Trent Kelly, R-Miss.; Joe Courtney, D-Conn.; and Jerry Carl, R-Ala. who were accompanied by U.S. Marine Corps Lt. Gen. Karsten Heckl and Lt. Gen. Christopher Mahoney today for a meeting with Ingalls Shipbuilding leadership and a shipyard tour visit.

title: HII and Ocean Aero to Partner on Advanced Unmanned Maritime Capabilities
text: MCLEAN, Va. and GULFPORT, Miss., March 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) and Ocean Aero initiated a strategic agreement to advance the combined capabilities of their respective unmanned maritime platforms and autonomy software solutions. The unmanned solution providers recently commenced multiple, simultaneous efforts to enhance the operational reach and duration of the platforms, collaborative autonomy behaviors, shared sensor fusion and perception capabilities, and accelerated seabed-to-shore data transmission methods.
